bank_defaults.cash_advance: 2.5% of transaction amount (subject to a minimum of Rs.500) for both domestic and international ATMs
bank_defaults.cash_interest: All cash advances carry a finance charge equal to charges on revolving credit (up to 3.75% per month [45% per annum] from the transaction date) from the date of withdrawal until the date of full payment; Free Credit Period: Nil
bank_defaults.late_fee_tiers: Nil for Rs.0-Rs.100; Rs.100 for >Rs.100 & up to Rs.500; Rs.500 for >Rs.500 & up to Rs.1,000; Rs.750 for >Rs.1,000 & up to Rs.10,000; Rs.950 for >Rs.10,000 & up to Rs.25,000; Rs.1,100 for >Rs.25,000 & up to Rs.50,000; Rs.1,300 for >Rs.50,000. Additional Rs.100 levied on missing MAD by due date for two consecutive cycles.
bank_defaults.source_section: Section F Finance Charges (line 501), Section E Interest free credit period (line 497), Cash Advance interest (Section B line 489, line 502), Free Credit Period Nil (line 1218), Cash Advance Fees (lines 1222-1228), Late Payment charges (lines 766-774), Foreign Currency Transaction Fee (line 816), Schedule of Charges summary (lines 1211-1254)
